nodes.label: AI Generation Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Input→Guardrail Injection→Prompt Builder→Gemini→Zod Validation→Heuristic Scoring→Judge LLM→Ranking→Persist

nodes.label: Workspace Isolation (SaaS)
nodes.rationale: Every query must include workspaceId filter - mandatory SaaS isolation

nodes.label: Queue System
nodes.rationale: content-generation queue, max 3 retries, exponential backoff

nodes.label: OKLCH Color Token System
nodes.rationale: All colors use OKLCH for perceptual uniformity. Semantic tokens never hardcoded.

nodes.label: Consumer Psychology Patterns
nodes.rationale: Scarcity, Loss Aversion, Social Proof, Anchoring, Goal Gradient, Reward, Authority, Endowment Effect, Commitment
